channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: 5 takeaways from an Oscars night that spread the love
item.description: It's thrilling to see the Academy recognize a weird, funny, scary performance like Amy Madigan's in Weapons. Here's what NPR critic Linda Holmes thought of the awards.
item.content:encoded:
It's thrilling to see the Academy recognize a weird, funny, scary performance like Amy Madigan's in Weapons. Here's what NPR critic Linda Holmes thought of the awards.

(Image credit: Mike Coppola)
item.dc:creator: Linda Holmes

item.title: 'One Battle After Another' takes best picture. Here's the full list of Oscar winners
item.description: Michael B. Jordan and Jessie Buckley won best actor and best actress. Paul Thomas Anderson received best director. Cassandra Kulukundis won the Academy's first ever casting award.
item.content:encoded:
Michael B. Jordan and Jessie Buckley won best actor and best actress. Paul Thomas Anderson received best director. Cassandra Kulukundis won the Academy's first ever casting award.

(Image credit: Kevin Winter)
item.dc:creator: Clare Lombardo

item.title: See the Oscars red carpet looks
item.description: See looks from best actor Michael B. Jordan, best actress Jessie Buckley and more stars on the Oscars red carpet on Sunday night.
item.content:encoded:
See looks from best actor Michael B. Jordan, best actress Jessie Buckley and more stars on the Oscars red carpet on Sunday night.

(Image credit: Lexie Moreland)
item.dc:creator: Meredith Nierman

item.title: Selection Sunday: Duke No. 1 overall in men's tournament, UConn women get top seed
item.description: Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.
item.content:encoded:
Duke will be the top overall seed in the men's NCAA basketball tournament. In the women's, the top-ranked UConn Huskies are undefeated and hope to repeat as champions for the first time in a decade.

(Image credit: Jacob Kupferman)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Snow and wind batter parts of US, with threat of thunderstorms and tornadoes
item.description: A broad and erratic patchwork of severe weather rumbled across much of the U.S. on Sunday, dumping heavy snow in the Upper Midwest while damaging high winds swept across the Plains.
item.content:encoded:
A broad and erratic patchwork of severe weather rumbled across much of the U.S. on Sunday, dumping heavy snow in the Upper Midwest while damaging high winds swept across the Plains.

(Image credit: BRENDAN SMIALOWSKI)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Israeli soldiers fire on family car in occupied West Bank, killing 4
item.description: Israeli soldiers fired on a car carrying a family in the northern West Bank, killing four people including two children, the Palestinian Authority's Health Ministry said.
item.content:encoded:
Israeli soldiers fired on a car carrying a family in the northern West Bank, killing four people including two children, the Palestinian Authority's Health Ministry said.

(Image credit: Majdi Mohammed)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 'We never asked for a ceasefire,' says Iran's foreign minister, as war keeps raging
item.description: Israel announced a barrage of new strikes on western Iran on Sunday, while Iran's foreign minister said the country has not asked for a ceasefire as President Trump had claimed.
item.content:encoded:
Israel announced a barrage of new strikes on western Iran on Sunday, while Iran's foreign minister said the country has not asked for a ceasefire as President Trump had claimed.

(Image credit: Ohad Zwigenberg)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Sunday Puzzle: BAD!
item.description: Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with KCUR listener Justin Marciniak and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.content:encoded: Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with KCUR listener Justin Marciniak and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.dc:creator: Will Shortz

item.title: Acclaimed 20th century philosopher Jürgen Habermas dies at 96
item.description: Associated with the Frankfurt School, Habermas was a world-renowned thinker on modernity and democracy who helped shape German post-war and post-reunification political discourse.
item.content:encoded:
Associated with the Frankfurt School, Habermas was a world-renowned thinker on modernity and democracy who helped shape German post-war and post-reunification political discourse.

(Image credit: Louisa Gouliamaki)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: Why the Chicago Bears could be moving to Indiana
item.description: While Illinois is trying to keep the team in Chicago's suburbs, Indiana lawmakers are offering a plan to finance a new stadium
item.content:encoded:
While Illinois is trying to keep the team in Chicago's suburbs, Indiana lawmakers are offering a plan to finance a new stadium

(Image credit: Nam Y. Huh)
item.dc:creator: Lydia Calitri
